message:
feat(c-api,deps): C API expansion and dependency updates

- Expand SQLite C compatibility API with additional function bindings
- Update Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock dependencies
- Minor contention elimination test adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
